name: Solvency-Aware Sizing
description: A survival-optimal position-sizing strategy skill: turns CoinMarketCap Agent Hub signals into a deterministic size-or-skip decision that maximises how long an agent stays solvent under a burn rate and a max-drawdown DQ cap - not expected return. Reproducibly backtested against Kelly and fixed-fraction baselines.

dataSources.name: CoinMarketCap AI Agent Hub (MCP)
dataSources.usedFor: Deriving the edge and volatility inputs (RSI/MACD/MA momentum, realised vol) and the risk-on/risk-off regime gate.
dataSources.derivation: src/signals.ts - deriveSignals() maps these signals to (edge, volatility) deterministically, in code (no model judgment); signalsFromHub() pulls the tools and derives in one call.

peakBalanceUsd.description: Cash high-water mark - fallback drawdown peak for cash-only callers.

netWorthUsd.description: Portfolio net worth (cash + open positions). The DQ drawdown is measured on this. Defaults to balanceUsd.

peakNetWorthUsd.description: All-time net-worth high-water mark - the drawdown peak (ratchets up only). Defaults to peakBalanceUsd.

burnRatePerHourUsd.description: Cost of being alive (USD/hour): rent + expected data burn.

edge.description: Expected fractional return on the position, derived from Agent Hub signals (e.g. 0.02 = +2%).

volatility.description: Fractional downside risk over the hold, from the TA payload (e.g. 0.05 = 5%).

gasPerSwapUsd.description: Live gas cost of a single swap (USD).

maxPositionFraction.description: Never deploy more than this fraction of balance in one position.

minPositionUsd.description: Smallest viable position (below this, gas is pure friction).

cashReserveHours.description: Hours of burn to keep unspent (prevents going all-in).

edgeMargin.description: Required margin of edge over friction before trading.

desperation.description: Survival pressure: 0 comfortable, 1 at death's door. Frees the rent reserve and lowers the edge bar as runway shrinks.

drawdownBreached.description: The DQ cap is already permanently breached → cap is voided, trade for recovery bounded by cash.

mustTrade.description: Daily-floor override: force the least-harmful qualifying trade (≥1 trade/day rule).

roundTripFrictionFraction.description: Round-trip friction as a fraction of the evaluated size.

reason.description: Human-legible rationale: the edge, the friction it had to clear, and which rule drove the call.

backtest.headline: Over a 7-day window (2000 agents, seed=1): solvency-aware 100% survive vs kelly 8% vs fixed-fraction 0%.

notes: Pure, deterministic function: same inputs → same decision. No I/O, no randomness.
Sizes an already-chosen candidate trade; it does not pick tokens or execute orders.
Every numeric claim is reproducible from the scripts in this repo - verify, don't trust.
